rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves the common threshold, latent seller type, noisy observed score, classification-error mechanism, payoff objective, and absence of review capacity.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the admission owner, trigger, decision, information, stakes, trade-off, and alternative thresholds concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels score distributions as assumptions and rejects perfect intent measurement and unmodeled safety claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and structured but considerably more verbose than needed, with minor encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete and model-faithful screening narrative with no hard failure.
